typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#F5F5F5]
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#F5F5F5]
typography.label: text-sm font-medium text-[#F5F5F5] uppercase tracking-wider

spacing_and_layout.grid_services: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8

components.navbar: Glassmorphism header, sticky top-0, z-50, bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#262626]. Must include logo, nav links, and a gold outline CTA.
components.hero: Split layout or dark overlay. Left: oversized Cormorant Garamond heading (gold accents), value proposition, primary gold solid CTA and secondary outline CTA. Right: Image of justice scales or dark office.
components.service_card: Dark surface #141414, 1px border #262626. On hover: border turns to #D4AF37, slight -translate-y-1 lift. Includes a lucide-react icon (gold), title, and brief description.
components.about_us: Two-column layout. Left: high-quality image of dark office or scales. Right: Heading, text, and 3 stat counters (e.g., '10+ Anos', '500+ Casos Vencidos', 'R$50M+ Economizados').
components.faq_accordion: Shadcn Accordion. Dark mode styled: bg-[#141414], white text, gold icon on expand.
components.contact_form: Shadcn Form inside a card. Inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A], border-[#262626], focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37]. Includes Nome, Telefone, Email, Serviço de Interesse (Select), Mensagem. Submit button: solid Gold.
components.whatsapp_fab: Fixed bottom-right corner, z-50. WhatsApp green bg, white icon, drop-shadow-lg, hover:scale-110 transition-transform.
components.footer: Dark bg #0A0A0A, border-t border-[#262626]. Columns for Logo/About, Quick Links, Contact Info, and Legal Disclaimer (OAB). Small text.

hero_bg.description: Elegant balance of technology and justice scales on an office desk, symbolizing law and balance.

about_us.description: Dark and moody law office, books in glass bookcase, signaling deep expertise.

agro_debt_context.description: Silhouette of a tree during golden hour in Brazil, used for the Agribusiness debt section or as an atmospheric background.

services_list.title: Cancelamento de Busca e Apreensão de Veículos
Restituição de Taxas e Tarifas Ilegais
Ação para Remover Vencido do Bacen
Retiramos Nome do Jusbrasil e Escavador
Desbloqueio de Conta e Quitação com Desconto
Redução de Impostos de Empresas até 40%

accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and links must have explicit hover states (e.g., text color change, background lightness change).
accessibility_and_interactions.focus_states: Form inputs must use gold ring on focus. No default blue outlines.
accessibility_and_interactions.animations: Subtle fade-in-up for sections on scroll using framer-motion. Staggered fade-in for service cards.
accessibility_and_interactions.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, accordion triggers) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Ensure the exact 12 services provided in 'services_list' are rendered in the Services section grid.
The primary WhatsApp number is '+55 21 96923-5528'. Use this in the Contact section and the Floating Action Button.
The Contact form must collect: Nome, Telefone, Email, Serviço de Interesse (using a Select dropdown populated with the 12 services), and Mensagem.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) for the background; stick to the specified #0A0A0A.
Typography: Import 'Cormorant Garamond' from Google Fonts and use it exclusively for h1, h2, and large display text. Use 'Inter' for body.
Make sure the hero heading includes gold text accents (e.g., specific words highlighted in the gold gradient).
Implement Shadcn UI for the Form, Select, Accordion, and potentially Cards, but override styles to match the dark/luxury theme.
